allow: Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\(''multiaiagent_simple.ipynb''\)\); [print\(i, c[''source''][:100] if c[''source''] else ''\(empty\)''\) for i,c in enumerate\(nb[''cells'']\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; nb=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cells=nb[''cells'']; print\(f''Total cells: {len\(cells\)}''\); [print\(f''Cell {i}: id={c[""id""]}, type={c[""cell_type""]}''\) for i,c in enumerate\(cells\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; nb=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cell=nb[''cells''][11]; print\(''SOURCE:''\); print\(''''.join\(cell[''source'']\)\); print\(''\\nOUTPUTS:''\); [print\(json.dumps\(o, indent=2\)\) for o in cell.get\(''outputs'',[]\)]")
